zh.of Dalby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾達爾比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel De Tateshale於大約1250年出生在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾時，她的父親Robert de Tattershall IV29歲，母親Nichola24歲。她於大約1280年與Sir John de Orreby在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾達爾比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.of Dalby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾達爾比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel De Tateshale于大约1250年出生在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾时，她的父亲Robert de Tattershall IV29岁，母亲Nichola24岁。她于大约1280年与Sir John de Orreby在英国英格兰林可爾史爾達爾比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel De Tateshale was born about 1250, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert de Tattershall IV, was 29 and her mother, Nichola, was 24. She married Sir John de Orreby about 1280, in Dalby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel De Tateshale est née environ 1250, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Tattershall IV, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Nichola, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Orreby environ 1280, à Dalby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel De Tateshale um 1250 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Tattershall IV 29 und ihre Mutter Nichola 24. Sie hat um 1280 in Dalby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John de Orreby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Tateshale è nata il circa 1250 nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Tattershall IV, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Nichola, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Orreby circa 1280, nel Dalby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel De Tateshaleが約1250年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで生まれた時，父Robert de Tattershall IVは29歳，母Nicholaは24歳であった。約1280年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアダルビーでSir John de Orrebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel De Tateshale(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Tattershall IV(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichola(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 다비에서 Sir John de Orreby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Tateshale nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Tattershall IV, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Nichola, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Orreby aproximadamente 1280, em Dalby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel De Tateshale родилась около 1250 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Tattershall IV было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Nichola, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Orreby около 1280 г. в местности далби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel De Tateshale nació aproximadamente 1250, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Tattershall IV, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Nichola, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John de Orreby aproximadamente 1280, en Dalby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
